content.topic: ⚠️ IMAGES ARE BLOCKED⚠️ | Continuwuity is a Rust homeserver implementation, the official community-driven continuation of conduwuit and conduit, suitable for self-hosting! This is the main support room for all things continuwuity - join the space at #space:continuwuity.org, and offtopic breakout room at #offtopic:continuwuity.org for general chitchat. | Docs: https://continuwuity.org/ | Guidelines: https://continuwuity.org/community | Forge: https://forgejo.ellis.link/continuwuation/continuwuity

m.text.body: Ping the bot to check if it is online.
Get a state event's JSON content with the given event type and optional state key.
The state key of the state event to fetch. If not provided, the empty string is used.
Get information about a user, such as their display name, avatar URL, and mutual rooms.
The user ID to get information about.
Reposts an event to the current room, taking advantage of MSC4144.
The event link to forward, e.g. `$event_id`, `matrix:roomid/room_alias/e/event_id`, or `matrix.to`. If not provided, the bot will attempt to forward the event being replied to.
Fetch the signing keys for a given server, optionally through a notary.
The name of the server to fetch signing keys for.
The notary server to query for the signing keys. If not provided, only a direct-fetch will be attempted.
Get the state history of a given state event. Usually not very useful. Traverses predecessors.
The type of the state event to fetch, e.g. `m.room.name`.
The state key of the state event to fetch, or empty for the latest event.
Get a CSV of servers in the given room, or the current room if none is specified.
The room ID or alias to get servers from. Can be a Matrix URI or matrix.to URL. If not specified, the current room is used.
Asks every server for their head of the room's DAG
Compress output
Disables paginator and prompts and just spits out all info. Very spammy.
The ID or alias of the room to poll the DAG head of. Defaults to invoking room.
Get a list of available commands.
Convert a timestamp to a human-readable date. Accepts both seconds and milliseconds.
The timestamp to convert to a human-readable date. Can be in seconds or milliseconds.
[Operator Only] Reload the bot's state for all rooms or a given one.
The room ID or alias to reload state for. If omitted, reloads all rooms.
Append a sticker to a sticker pack in the current room.
The name of the sticker pack to append to (case sensitive).
The file name for the sticker being added, or 'auto' to infer from the message or reply.
The caption for the sticker being added.
[Operator Only] Leave a room by ID or alias.
The room ID or alias to leave.
The reason for leaving the room, shown in the room history.
Resolve a room alias to its ID.
The room alias or ID to resolve. Can be a Matrix URI or matrix.to URL.
Get the membership history of a user in the room. Traverses predecessors.
The user ID to get the membership history for.
Get information about a server, such as its name, client-to-server API, server-to-server API, version, and support contacts.
The server name to get information about.
Get an event's JSON content via the event's ID, or matrix URL.
The event link to fetch, e.g. `$event_id`, `matrix:roomid/room_alias/e/event_id`, or `matrix.to`.
Get information about a room, such as its name, topic, creation date, and alias.
The room ID or alias to get information about. Can be a Matrix URI or matrix.to URL, or literally '.' to refer to the current room.
[Operator Only] Join a room by ID or alias.
The room ID or alias to join. Can be a Matrix URI or matrix.to URL.
The reason for joining the room, shown in the room history.
